rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.description: A dimly lit stone hall. Torches flicker on the walls.

rooms.name: Guard Room
rooms.description: Broken weapons litter the floor. Something moves in the shadows.

rooms.name: Old Library
rooms.description: Dusty bookshelves line the walls. An old scholar sits reading.

rooms.name: Hidden Cache
rooms.description: A small room with a gleaming chest in the corner.

rooms.name: Safe Room
rooms.description: A warm campfire crackles. You feel safe here.

rooms.name: Boss Chamber
rooms.description: A massive door looms ahead. Beyond it, the floor guardian waits.

rooms.name: Cavern Mouth
rooms.description: Crystals glow faintly in the damp stone walls.

rooms.name: Slime Den
rooms.description: The floor is slick with slime. Gelatinous shapes quiver nearby.

rooms.name: Bone Yard
rooms.description: Bones crunch underfoot. Skeletal figures rise from the debris.

rooms.name: Crystal Grotto
rooms.description: A traveling merchant has set up shop among the crystals.

rooms.name: Gem Cache
rooms.description: A sparkling chest sits atop a crystal formation.

rooms.name: Crystal Pool
rooms.description: A glowing pool of water radiates warmth. Rest here.

rooms.name: Dragon's Lair
rooms.description: Heat washes over you. A young dragon curls around a golden crystal.

rooms.name: Abyss Entry
rooms.description: Darkness stretches in every direction. A cold wind howls.

rooms.name: Shadow Hall
rooms.description: Shadows twist and writhe. Something lunges from the dark.

rooms.name: Goblin Warren
rooms.description: Goblins chatter in the darkness, weapons at the ready.

rooms.name: Ancient Shrine
rooms.description: An old shrine glows softly. Peace fills the air.

rooms.name: Vault
rooms.description: A treasure vault! Gold and crystals fill the room.

rooms.name: Final Chamber
rooms.description: The exit is here. But a massive dragon blocks the way.
